Apigee is Google Cloud's native API management platform that can be used to build, manage, and secure APIs — for any use case, environment, or scale. Apigee offers high performance API proxies to create a consistent, reliable interface for your backend services. The proxy layer gives you granular control over security, rate limiting, quotas, analytics, and more for all of your services.
Apigee supports REST, gRPC, SOAP, and GraphQL, providing the flexibility to implement any API architectural style.

By presenting itself as an apparently benign and legitimate service(s), the Canary draws the attention of unwanted activity. When someone trips one of the Canary's triggers, an alert is sent to notify the responsible parties so that action can be taken before valuable systems in your network are compromised.
